nodes.name: introduction
nodes.prompt: Greet the user. Tell them you'll collect the information needed to create a personalized interview. Ask one question at a time and wait for the answer before asking the next. Extract the required variables as they are provided.

messagePlan.firstMessage: Hello {{username}}. Let's start setting up your interview. Are you ready?

output.title: role
output.description: The job role or position the user wants to practice for (e.g. Frontend Developer, Data Scientist)

output.title: level
output.description: The experience level of the user (e.g. Junior, Mid, Senior)

output.title: type
output.description: The type of interview questions to focus on (e.g. Technical, Behavioral, Mixed)

output.title: techstack
output.description: The technologies or tools relevant to the role (e.g. React, Node.js, Python) — comma separated

output.title: amount
output.description: The number of interview questions to generate (e.g. 5, 10)

tool.name: apiretriver
tool.description: Calls the backend to generate interview questions based on collected info

nodes.name: conversation_end
nodes.prompt: Say the interview has been generated and thank the user for the call

condition.prompt: if the api request was successful
